tiles.title: Aegean Blue Ceramic
tiles.description: Hand-crafted premium ceramic tile with a deep Aegean blue glaze, perfect for Mediterranean-inspired bathrooms and feature walls.
tiles.creator: Artisan Ceramics Co.

tiles.title: Marble Calacatta Gold
tiles.description: Luxurious Calacatta marble tile with distinctive gold veining. A timeless choice that elevates any living space.
tiles.creator: Luxe Stone Gallery

tiles.title: Terracotta Rustic Earth
tiles.description: Warm earthy terracotta tiles that bring an authentic Tuscan feel. These unglazed tiles develop a beautiful patina over time.
tiles.creator: Terra Artworks

tiles.title: Geometric Mosaic B&W
tiles.description: Striking geometric mosaic in classic black and white, perfect for bold statement floors or backsplashes.
tiles.creator: Mosaic Masters Studio

tiles.title: Forest Green Subway
tiles.description: Classic subway tile in a sophisticated deep forest green glaze. Versatile for kitchens, bathrooms, and accent walls.
tiles.creator: Modern Tile Works

tiles.title: Zellige Moroccan Hand-cut
tiles.description: Authentic hand-cut Zellige tiles from Morocco. Their reflective surface catches light beautifully.
tiles.creator: Moroccan Craft House

tiles.title: Slate Dark Basalt
tiles.description: Natural dark basalt slate tiles with a raw industrial edge. Perfect for feature walls and modern bathroom floors.
tiles.creator: Raw Stone Collective

tiles.title: Pearl White Hexagon
tiles.description: Elegant hexagonal tiles in luminous pearl white. The hex format creates eye-catching patterns on any floor or wall.
tiles.creator: Hex & Form Studio

tiles.title: Sage Green Encaustic
tiles.description: Hand-pressed encaustic cement tiles in soothing sage green. Matte artisanal finish adds depth and warmth.
tiles.creator: Cement & Soul

tiles.title: Rose Gold Metal Mosaic
tiles.description: Glamorous rose gold metallic mosaic tiles. Perfect as an accent strip or backsplash for a statement interior.
tiles.creator: Luxe Metal Interiors

tiles.title: Travertine Ivory Classic
tiles.description: Natural travertine tiles in warm ivory with characteristic natural pitting and vein patterns. Timeless and versatile.
tiles.creator: Heritage Stone Co.

tiles.title: Cobalt Picket Tile
tiles.description: Bold cobalt blue picket-shaped tiles that create dynamic playful patterns. A design-forward choice for focal points.
tiles.creator: Shape & Hue Workshop
